data.title: Dormant Bitcoin Wallet Activated After 14 Years
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a Bitcoin wallet that had been inactive for over 14 years was recently activated. The wallet contains 4,000 BTC, valued at approximately $442 million. These Bitcoins were originally worth $67,724 back in 2011. The activation of such long-dormant wallets often attracts attention due to the significant increase in value over time.

source: https://cryptoslate.com/trump-tariff-short-trader-who-made-200m-correctly-predicts-binances-cz-pardon/

data.title: Breaking: Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) Files 8-A to List on NYSE
data.description:
Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) gears up for listing as the issuer submitted an amended 8-A filing with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The final deadline for the US SEC to decide on Bitwise’s BSOL exchange-traded fund (ETF) was October 16, which got delayed due to the prolonged U
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/23/breaking-bitwise-solana-staking-etf-bsol-files-8-a-to-list-on-nyse/

data.title: Base Chain Activity Jumps 22.5%, But Bitcoin Hyper is the Only Layer-2 With Solana Speed, Bitcoin Security
data.description:

While the two aren’t direct competitors, as Base runs on Ethereum (ETH) while Bitcoin Hyper is being built on Bitcoin (BTC), they share a similar mission: […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/base-activity-up-22-5-bitcoin-hyper-solana-speed/
